# Koh Hom's Blog

> A software engineering blog by Koh Hom (许峰), focusing on frontend development, testing, React, and AI-assisted coding. Bilingual content in English and Chinese.

## About the Author

Koh Hom is a software engineer from Chaoshan, China. Graduated from South China Normal University (SCNU). Previously interned at Ant Group and ByteDance. Currently working at TikTok in Singapore.

## Topics Covered

- Frontend Development (React, Redux, Hooks, Server Components, Performance Optimization)
- Software Testing (TDD, Test Case Design, React Testing, E2E Testing)
- Software Engineering (SDLC, Agile, Code Complexity, Tailwind CSS Architecture)
- AI & Code Generation (ChatGPT, GitHub Copilot, Modular Design with AI, Agent Skills)
- Web Performance (Core Web Vitals, Browser Internals)
- Computer Science Fundamentals (SICP, Data Abstraction)

## Recent Posts

- [Agent Skills: The Functional Blueprint for AI Agents](https://clean99.github.io/2026/03/23/Agent-Skills-The-Functional-Blueprint-for-AI-Agents/)
- [Vibe Coding VS Spec-Driven Coding](https://clean99.github.io/2026/03/18/Vibe-Coding-VS-Spec-Driven-Coding/)
- [A Complete SEO Overhaul for My Hexo Blog](https://clean99.github.io/2026/03/10/A-Complete-SEO-Overhaul-for-My-Hexo-Blog/)
